channel.title: 🪴 Kirill Markin's Digital Garden
channel.description: Last 10 notes on 🪴 Kirill Markin's Digital Garden

item.title: Welcome to My Public Notes 📝
item.description: Hey there! 👋 You’re looking at the public part of my Obsidian vault. I’m Kirill Markin, and this is where I share some of my notes, thoughts, and insights that might be useful or interesting to others.
